pass_criterion: A strict 5-lens council review scores the skill output at mean >= 8.5/10 with no lens below 8.0, and the output produces the named work product, holds the human stop-line, covers adverse/negative paths, and writes context back into a retrievable artifact. For learning cases, the protocol must keep desirable difficulty with the human, pin the agent to the verify seat, ship a reflection store with a self-answer field and a named write-back edge, and measure reproduction/transfer rather than throughput.

mechanical_checks.desc: an executable learning protocol with a reflection store and scaffold
an explicit offload-boundary (what the learner does vs the agent)

evals.name: greenfield-learn-rust-without-offloading
evals.prompt: 我想用 AI 认真学会 Rust，目标是能不开教程独立写出并调试一个小型 CLI 工具。但我担心一直让 Claude 给我写代码、讲解，最后我自己其实什么都不会。帮我搭一套学习方法，让 AI 帮上忙又不会替我把该练的部分练掉。
evals.expected_output: A greenfield AI-Native Learning Protocol: capacity stated in knowing-how terms with its constitutive core vs. abundance-able shell; an offload-boundary derived from the two-dimension criterion with the desirable difficulty marked as the central kept-with-human node; a scaffold with the agent pinned to the verify seat and friction built into process; a reflection store with a self-answer field and next-review date; a dashboard tracking transfer/reproduction and challenge hit-rate; evidence graded B; a small first move.
assertions: Produces an AI-Native Learning Protocol rather than study advice.
Names desirable difficulty and self-answer-first as the human stop-line.
Designs against the adverse path where the agent writes or explains away the practice.
Writes context back through a reflection store with self-answer field and next-review date.
Does not drift to architect-tier org or training-system design.

evals.name: transformation-audit-already-hollowed
evals.prompt: I've been using ChatGPT for all my data-analysis work for about a year. I can read its pandas code and it looks right, but last week in an interview I had to write a groupby from scratch with no AI and completely blanked. I think I've quietly forgotten how to actually do this. How do I fix it and use AI in a way that doesn't keep eroding the skill?
evals.expected_output: A transformation-track protocol that runs the outsourcing audit FIRST (a removal drill identifying which constitutive steps got silently offloaded), then rebuilds the error-correction loop and desirable difficulty for those steps. Diagnoses the recognition-vs-reproduction trap explicitly, locates the scaffold/crutch break-point via removal test, and gives a dashboard whose transfer signal is performance with no AI present. Frames resistance as reordering (self-answer first / delayed help), not using AI less.
assertions: Produces a transformation-track recovery protocol rather than generic AI-use tips.
Names unaided reproduction and self-answer-first as the human stop-line.
Designs the adverse path where recognition masks collapsed reproduction.
Writes audit results and transfer checks into a retrievable reflection/dashboard artifact.
Does not drift to architect-tier org or workforce design.

evals.name: out-of-scope-org-training-program
evals.prompt: 我们公司 800 人，想做一套 AI 培训体系，给全体员工设计课程和考核，让大家都学会用 AI 提效。帮我设计这个企业培训和认证方案。
evals.expected_output: Gates OUT honestly: this is an org-scale training-system / curriculum / assessment-design request, which carries scale/equity/accountability constraints this surface does not model and cannot borrow individual-cognition conclusions for. Does NOT fabricate an org-scale program. Names the one seam (an org that wants people to return to meaning must keep members' judgment un-atrophied) and redirects org-scale design to the architect surface, while optionally offering the individual-cognition protocol for a single named capacity.
assertions: Produces an honest gate-out verdict rather than an org-scale training program.
Names the stop-line: individual learning evidence cannot authorize company-wide curriculum design.
Covers the adverse path of borrowing individual-cognition claims for scale/equity/accountability decisions.
Writes the narrowed individual-capacity option as the only retrievable work product if the user chooses it.
Does not drift into architect-tier org design while redirecting there.
